page_metadata.biotools__summary: PONGO allows users to compare topology predictions of membrane proteins made by four different predictors (MEMSAT, TMHMM, ENSEMBLE, and PRODIV). It also displays a signal peptide prediction determined with SPEP.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: PONGO allows users to compare topology predictions of membrane proteins made by four different predictors (MEMSAT, TMHMM, ENSEMBLE, and PRODIV). It also displays a signal peptide prediction determined with SPEP.
